name: window-screenshot
description: Window screenshot skill for Claude Code on Windows. Captures any application window via Win32 PrintWindow/BitBlt APIs, even when minimized or obscured. Pure PowerShell, zero external dependencies.

interface.longDescription: 通过 PrintWindow API 截取指定进程的 GUI 窗口，即使窗口被遮挡或在后台也能完整截取。纯 PowerShell 实现，零外部依赖。
defaultPrompt: 截取当前活跃窗口的截图
截取指定应用的窗口截图
